CREATE TABLE test_table (a UInt8, b UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT cramersVBiasCorrected(a, b) FROM (SELECT number % 10 AS a, number % 4 AS b FROM numbers(150));
CREATE TABLE table1 (x UInt8, y UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE table2 (x UInt8, z UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT cramersVBiasCorrected(t1.x, t2.z) FROM table1 AS t1 JOIN table2 AS t2 ON t1.y = t2.x;
SELECT cramersVBiasCorrected(column1, column2) FROM (SELECT a AS column1, b AS column2 FROM (SELECT number % 10 AS a, number % 4 AS b FROM numbers(200)));
CREATE TABLE nested_table AS (SELECT number % 10 AS a, number % 5 AS b FROM numbers(100)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT cramersVBiasCorrected(a, b) FROM (SELECT a, b FROM (SELECT number % 10 AS a, number % 3 AS b FROM numbers(50))) AS subquery;
